Package net.sf.jailer.api

Klasse Importer

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.api.Importer
public class Importer extends Object
Imports subset data.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser

    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

    Default constructor.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Importer

      public Importer()
      Default constructor.

    • Importer

      public Importer(DataSource dataSource)
      Creates a new Importer with all mandatory attributes.
      Parameter:
      dataSource - the data-source to connect with the database

  • Methodendetails

    • execute

      public void execute(File inputScript) throws IOException, SQLException
      Imports a SQL-script-file.
      Parameter:
      inputScript - the SQL-script-file
      Löst aus:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • getDataSource

      public DataSource getDataSource()
      Gets the data-source to connect with the database.
      Gibt zurück:
      the data-source to connect with the database

    • setDataSource

      public void setDataSource(DataSource dataSource)
      Sets the data-source to connect with the database.
      Parameter:
      dataSource - the data-source to connect with the database

    • getNumberOfThreads

      public int getNumberOfThreads()
      Gets number of threads. (default is 1)
      Gibt zurück:
      number of threads (default is 1)

    • setNumberOfThreads

      public void setNumberOfThreads(int numberOfThreads)
      Sets number of threads. (default is 1)
      Parameter:
      numberOfThreads - number of threads (default is 1)

    • getTransactional

      public boolean getTransactional()
      If true, import rows in a single transaction. (default is true)
      Gibt zurück:
      true if import rows in a single transaction

    • setTransactional

      public void setTransactional(boolean transactional)
      If true, import rows in a single transaction. (default is true)
      Parameter:
      transactional - true if import rows in a single transaction

    • getIsolationLevel

      public Integer getIsolationLevel()
      Gets the isolation level.
      Gibt zurück:
      the isolation level, or null if not set
      Siehe auch:
      • Connection.setTransactionIsolation(int)

    • setIsolationLevel

      public void setIsolationLevel(Integer isolationLevel)
      Sets the isolation level.
      Parameter:
      isolationLevel - the isolation level to set
      Siehe auch:
      • Connection.setTransactionIsolation(int)
